title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Walker Chandiok

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Walker Chandiok
jsonLd.description:
Walker Chandiok is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Srinagar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Walker Chandiok:
Walker Chandiok is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Walker Chandiok!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
